help.title: Help
help.requirementExtension: Chrome extension: loaded unpacked from this repository's extension folder.
help.requirementNode: Node.js: required to run the native host, currently expected at C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe.
help.requirementFfmpeg: ffmpeg: required for merging video and audio; configure its path in settings.
help.flow1: Open the course page and log in.
help.flow2: Open the extension and click Start video capture.
help.flow3: If the page has been open for a while, click Scan page to search iframe/video/resources again without reloading.
help.flow4: Press Play on the course page.
help.flow5: When variants appear, choose one, click Verify, check the real title/duration, and only then click Download.
help.flow6: If downloading starts, watch the Downloading status. Stop it with the red ■ button.
help.flow7: If direct download is not possible, the extension can start Tab recording. It records the tab with audio.
help.flow8: Before recording, Video Course Capture highlights the detected player area or iframe. Confirm the correct frame so the recording follows the video area, not the whole page.
help.flow8b: After confirmation, scrolling is locked, a 5-second countdown is shown, and recording starts from the same viewport position. This keeps the video area from shifting before capture begins.
help.flow9: When Recording is active, click Stop or press Ctrl+Shift+Y. The .webm file appears in Save folder only after recording stops.
help.statusIdle: Idle: the extension is not doing anything.
help.statusArmed: Capture armed: waiting for Play and searching for a stream.

status.settingsSaved: Settings saved. The next yt-dlp run will use these paths and limits.
status.verifyFirst: Click Verify first and confirm that this is the right video.
status.findingRecordingArea: Looking for the player area to record...
status.playerSelectedCountdown: Player selected. Press Play on the video; recording starts in 5 seconds.
status.candidatesFound: Found variants to verify: {count}. Choose a variant and click Verify.
status.sourceReadableNotConfirmedPrefix: Source is readable but NOT confirmed:
status.readyPlay: Ready. Press Play on the course page.
status.recordingSavedFolder: Recording saved in the downloads folder.
status.waitingEmbedPlaylist: Found an iframe player. Waiting for an HLS/API playlist before verification...
status.waitingVideoSource: Video started. Looking for a file, playlist, or player page...
status.candidateReadyVerify: Variant found. Choose it and click Verify; Download unlocks only after confirmation.
status.scanNeedsReload: Could not scan the page. Reload the extension or the tab.
status.scanNoNew: Scan complete: no new sources found.
status.candidateNotFound: This URL is no longer in the current source list.
status.sourceConfirmed: Source confirmed: {title}{duration}. You can now click Download.
status.sourceReadableNotConfirmed: Source is readable but NOT confirmed: {warning}. Do not download without checking.
status.downloadFailedCanRecord: yt-dlp could not download. You can use tab recording.
status.recordingTabAudio: Recording the current tab with audio...
status.stoppingRecording: Stopping recording and saving the file...
status.ytdlpDone: yt-dlp finished. The file is in the downloads folder.

activity.recordingDetail: Recording the current tab with audio. Click Stop to save the .webm file.
activity.recordingDetailWithSize: Recording the current tab with audio. Recorded {size}. Click Stop to save the .webm file.
activity.downloadingDetail: yt-dlp is running. The file will appear in the save folder if the download succeeds.
activity.armedDetail: Start video playback on the page. If the detected URL cannot be downloaded, tab recording can start.
activity.idleDetail: Click "Start video capture", then start the video, or click "Scan page" to search for video.

sources.title: Found variants
sources.note: Choose a variant to verify from the list above. URL details are shown here.
sources.foundVia: Found via: {source}. Click the URL to copy it.

overlay.selectPlayer: Video Course Capture: choose the player area for recording. Esc - cancel.
overlay.recordingLocked: Video Course Capture: recording is active. Scrolling is locked.
overlay.countdown: Video Course Capture: press Play. Recording starts in {seconds} sec.

errors.popupConnect: Popup could not connect to background: {error}
errors.reloadExtension: Extension error. Click Reload in chrome://extensions and try again.
